_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor suppressor alterations cooperate to drive aggressive mesotheliomas with enriched cancer stem cells via a p53-miR-34a-c-Met axis.

_contextSnippet: Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice had an increased incidence of advanced disease compared to Nf2+/− and WT mice, with most tumors being sarcomatous and having a high percentage of Ki67-positive cells
details: Successfully detected high percentage of Ki67-positive cells in sarcomatous tumors from Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice
